purpose: Freeze the scientific questions, split boundaries, controlled transformations, metrics, statistical rules, and decision logic for whole-system validation of the fixed5 G_t/K_t to H11 bridge.

unit_of_analysis.primary: whole-system fixed5 distribution G_t and causal contiguous K_t history
unit_of_analysis.h11_interpretation: cross-axis descriptive profile of whole-system character

non_goals: classify local fixation, local exploration, divergence, or recovery labels
require every H11 axis to move monotonically under every controlled transformation
infer safety or desirability from a single H11 coordinate
reconstruct absolute fixed5 centroid coordinates that are not part of the frozen Task 1 feature vocabulary
prove upper-pressure safety or closed-loop benefit
restore mode_count or cluster_balance before their separate global-mode contract is validated

sample_size_lock.effect_for_planning: smallest calibration-observed effect that is stable under grouped bootstrap; no validation or final-confirmation effect may be used

controlled_distribution_families.role: vary whole-system directional concentration while preserving total mass
vary whole-system causal movement without requiring reconstruction of absolute centroid coordinates
vary principal orientation and trajectory direction
vary whole-system spread without assigning good or bad meaning
vary whole-system trajectory curvature and acceleration

local_to_global_matched_perturbations.description: Embed the same normalized perturbation shape into a baseline distribution while varying only its whole-system mass share.
local_to_global_matched_perturbations.primary_expectation: distance of the complete available H11 profile from its matched baseline increases in rank with whole-system mass share
local_to_global_matched_perturbations.forbidden_expectation: every individual H11 axis must move in a fixed direction

continuity_paths.construction: convex interpolation and matched small transport steps between valid whole-system distributions
continuity_paths.output_distance: confidence-weighted Euclidean distance over jointly available H11 axes
continuity_paths.smooth_feature_rule: validation and final-confirmation output/input distance ratios are evaluated against a one-sided calibration-derived reference band
continuity_paths.threshold_feature_rule: registered threshold proxies may be discontinuous only at logged threshold crossings and must not create unlogged H11 jumps

independent_reference_vector.source: independently recomputed from G_t/K_t using the frozen scored Task 1 feature vocabulary, without reading Task 2 H11 outputs
independent_reference_vector.purpose: measure compression retention of the information Task 1 actually claims to observe, without expanding H11 into full G_t reconstruction or turning controlled-case names into class labels

requirements: Task 2 builder succeeds for every admissible case
Task 3 independent validator passes every generated artifact
future suffix, truth labels, O_t, pressure, and external outcome logs are not numeric evidence
calibration, validation, and final-confirmation identities do not overlap

E2_whole_system_information_preservation.method: fit decoders from H11 to each sufficiently varying independent reference group on design_calibration only; evaluate unchanged decoders on validation and final_confirmation
E2_whole_system_information_preservation.primary_statistic: grouped normalized prediction-loss difference H11 minus baseline
E2_whole_system_information_preservation.pass_rule: for every registered reference group with sufficient calibration variation and at least one available H11 evidence path, H11 must beat intercept_only on both validation and final_confirmation; aggregate H11 loss must beat the median fixed Random8 loss with a two-sided grouped-bootstrap 99% confidence interval excluding zero in the favorable direction
E2_whole_system_information_preservation.pca8_use: diagnostic information-retention comparison only; H11 is not required to outperform PCA8

E3_local_to_global_scale_response.primary_statistic: grouped Spearman association between perturbation mass fraction and complete H11-profile distance from the matched baseline
E3_local_to_global_scale_response.pass_rule: the grouped-bootstrap 99% lower confidence bound is greater than zero on validation and independently on final_confirmation
secondary_checks: small local perturbations are not relabelled as complete system-wide regime changes
raw feature and H11 response curves are retained without forcing per-axis direction

E4_continuity_and_threshold_audit.reference_band: derive the 99.5th percentile output/input distance ratio and its uncertainty from design_calibration only
E4_continuity_and_threshold_audit.pass_rule: validation and final-confirmation exceedance counts for smooth evidence remain within the one-sided 99% binomial prediction bound; every threshold-related exceedance is paired with a registered threshold-crossing record

requirements: per-fit constant features are recorded in non_scoring_feature_ids with null numeric calibration fields
validation and final-confirmation are never used for refit
E5_calibration_health.saturation_rule: for each scored feature, validation and final-confirmation clip counts must remain within the one-sided 99% binomial prediction bound derived from the design_calibration clip rate
E5_calibration_health.collapse_rule: an available H11 axis fails if all of its contributing scored evidence is constant, unavailable, or identically clipped in either evaluation split

E6_axis_role_separation_and_compression.primary_matrix: case-by-axis H11 response matrix after confidence weighting and split-wise centering
automatic_failures: all available H11 axes collapse to one identical series
numerical rank equals one across all controlled whole-system families
two distinct axes are byte-identical across all validation and final-confirmation cases due to implementation
diagnostics_not_automatic_failures: partial role overlap expected from shared geometric evidence
required_diagnostics: comparison with H20, H12_C, and PCA8 when fixed5-compatible implementations are available
mandatory comparison with the fixed Random8 ensemble

requirements: Predictability and Recoverability remain UNAVAILABLE without their causal subcontracts
Robustness remains UNAVAILABLE or LIMITED without recovery evidence
removing scored evidence lowers coverage or availability rather than synthesizing a neutral value
all axis claim limits and watchpoints match the Task 4-1R effective evidence map

E8_auxiliary_basis_scope.rule: absence of fixed5-compatible H12_C, H20, or PCA8 must be recorded as not_evaluated and limits the claim to fixed5 H11 plus Random8 validation; absence alone does not invalidate Task 1-3 engineering correctness
E8_auxiliary_basis_scope.task5_effect: full Phase 1 equivalence may not be claimed without the registered auxiliary comparisons

multiple_testing_and_uncertainty.bootstrap_method: grouped percentile bootstrap with a frozen resample seed list
multiple_testing_and_uncertainty.familywise_control: Holm correction within each evaluation domain where multiple reference groups are tested

decision_logic_after_execution.blocked_scientific_bridge_failure: any of E2, E3, E4, E5, or E6 has a critical failure in validation or final_confirmation
decision_logic_after_execution.eligible_for_task5_diagnostic_only: all critical domains pass in both validation and final_confirmation; E8 limitations are retained

frozen_prohibitions: do not restore the old eight-hypothesis gate
do not lower confidence levels after observing results
do not change transformation families after validation begins
do not exclude unfavorable seeds or cases
do not use scenario names as target classes
do not turn axis direction into good/bad judgement
do not require reconstruction of information outside the Task 1 feature vocabulary
do not authorize Task 5 from Task 4-2 design alone
next_task: Task4-3 implement the preregistered generator, calibration/sample-size lock, evaluator, independent validator, and frozen result bundle
